seat_diameter.description: Outer diameter of the circular seat

seat_radius.description: Radius of the circular seat (half of seat_diameter)

seat_thickness.description: Vertical thickness of the seat slab

seat_edge_radius.description: Rounding radius on the seat edge profile

total_height.description: Overall height from floor to top of seat surface (normalized longest dimension)

leg_height.description: Height of each leg from underside of seat to floor

leg_radius.description: Radius of each cylindrical leg (half of leg_diameter)

leg_spread_radius.description: Radial distance from stool center to each leg attachment point on the seat underside

leg_angle.description: Outward splay angle of each leg from vertical

leg_top_inset.description: Distance from seat edge to outer face of leg at the seat underside

leg_bottom_spread_dia.description: Diameter of the circle defined by the four leg positions at floor level

foot_diameter.description: Diameter of each rounded foot pad at the base of a leg

leg_count.description: Number of legs, evenly spaced at 90-degree intervals

leg_spacing_angle.description: Angular spacing between adjacent legs when viewed from above
